integrations.name: Supabase
integrations.notes: Migrations require manual SQL Editor run before deploy. Defensive insert pattern for migration-016/017/018 columns.

integrations.name: Clerk Auth
integrations.notes: Server routes must use auth() from @clerk/nextjs/server.

integrations.name: Anthropic AI
integrations.notes: Use prompt caching for long contexts. Default to claude-opus / claude-sonnet 4.x.

integrations.name: Google Drive / Sheets / Calendar
integrations.notes: Service account must be shared on each calendar / drive folder by user.

integrations.name: Slack
integrations.notes: Bot token requires chat:write + channels:read scopes.

integrations.name: PostHog
integrations.notes: Client-side telemetry. PII must be scrubbed before capture.

integrations.name: Monday.com
integrations.notes: Stored in app_config table, not env. Check getMondayApiToken().

integrations.name: Vercel deploy
integrations.notes: Auto-deploys on push. Branch -> preview, main -> production.
